en_title: Alix Wilton Regan on Becoming Lara Croft in Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis | IGN Live 2026
cn_title: 《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》新劳拉配音演员亮相
subtitle: 经典重启，声线传承
opus_summary: Alix Wilton Regan在IGN Live上分享为《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》配音劳拉的感受，称其为英国文化偶像。该作是1996年初代重制版，2027年2月12日登陆任天堂Switch 2、PS5、PC和Xbox Series X/S。

paragraphs.en: Lara Croft is going back to the beginning in the upcoming Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis , a new remake of the original Tomb Raider game from 1996. Taking on the beloved role of Lara Croft for this incarnation is Alix Wilton Regan (Assassin's Creed Origins, Dota: Dragon's Blood), who spoke about the game and her famous character at IGN Live today.
paragraphs.cn: 劳拉·克劳馥将在即将推出的《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》中回归原点，这是1996年初代《古墓丽影》的全新重制版。本次为劳拉·克劳馥这一备受喜爱的角色献声的是Alix Wilton Regan（《刺客信条：起源》《Dota：龙之血》），她今天在IGN Live上谈到了这款游戏和她饰演的著名角色。

paragraphs.en: During the panel, IGN debuted a snippet of the new "Meet Lara Croft" featurette in which Regan and the game's creators speak about the long legacy of the character and bringing to life her latest incarnation, and which you can watch the full video of above.
paragraphs.cn: 在座谈环节中，IGN首次公开了一段名为「遇见劳拉·克劳馥」的短片片段，片中Regan与游戏创作者们畅谈了该角色的悠久传承，以及如何将她的最新化身栩栩如生地呈现出来。你可以在上方观看完整视频。

paragraphs.en: So what's it like stepping into the shoes (or boots) of a character as well known as Lara Croft? Said Regan, "It’s amazing. Lara is a British cultural icon, she’s a global icon. She is loved and I love her as much as everyone else, so I’m ecstatic." She described Lara as "so completely confident in herself, in her abilities, her brain, her body, her being."
paragraphs.cn: 那么，扮演劳拉·克劳馥这样家喻户晓的角色是什么感觉？Regan表示：「太棒了。劳拉是英国的文化偶像，也是全球偶像。她深受喜爱，我和所有人一样爱她，所以我欣喜若狂。」她形容劳拉「对自己、对自己的能力、头脑、身体和存在都充满自信」。

paragraphs.en: Regan doesn't just have Legacy of Atlantis on the way, she's also playing Lara in the upcoming Tomb Raider: Catalyst, where she will embody an older Lara, on the heels of playing the younger version in Legacy of Atlantis. Regarding her approach to keeping the different ages distinct, Regan explained, "You break them down as much as possible. You ask your collaborators to help you keep track of it that because it is tricky. We’re trying to do something different with the voice in each game."
paragraphs.cn: Regan不仅将出演《亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》，还将在即将推出的《古墓丽影：催化剂》中饰演劳拉，在扮演了《亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》中的年轻版本后，她将塑造一个更年长的劳拉。关于如何区分不同年龄段的演绎，Regan解释道：「你要尽可能地把它们拆分开来。请合作者帮你记住区别，因为这很棘手。我们试图在每款游戏中用不同的声音来表现。」

paragraphs.en: Regan revealed that for Legacy of Atlantis, "We’ve lifted some of the most iconic lines from the first Tomb Raider," saying she loved "Just getting to play those lines with kind of that 90s sass being brought up to 2026." She also teased "A brilliant cast attached that I’m really sorry I can’t disclose yet!"
paragraphs.cn: Regan透露，在《亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》中，「我们提取了初代《古墓丽影》中一些最具标志性的台词」，她表示自己很喜欢「用那种90年代的俏皮感来演绎这些台词，并将其带入2026年」。她还卖了个关子：「还有一批出色的演员阵容，很抱歉我现在还不能透露！」

paragraphs.en: Regan admitted the mocap work she'd done for Tomb Raider could be physically taxing, noting "We’ve done huge three week shoots at a time" and laughing "You get a bit hot and sweaty and extremely intimate with your costars doing ten hours in a mocap suit."
paragraphs.cn: Regan承认，她为《古墓丽影》所做的动作捕捉工作对体力消耗很大，她提到「我们一次就要进行长达三周的大规模拍摄」，并笑着说：「穿着动捕服工作十个小时，你会变得又热又汗，和搭档也变得极其亲密。」

paragraphs.en: Regan said for extra inspiration to keep going during those long days, "I spend a lot of time looking at Lara's little avatar on screen... She is so smoking hot! I think we can all agree on that."
paragraphs.cn: Regan说，在那些漫长的日子里，为了获得额外的动力坚持下去，「我花了很多时间看着屏幕上劳拉的小化身……她太火辣了！我想我们都同意这一点。」

paragraphs.en: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis will be released February 12, 2027 on Nintendo Switch 2, PS5, PC, and Xbox Series X/S.
paragraphs.cn: 《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》将于2027年2月12日登陆任天堂Switch 2、PS5、PC和Xbox Series X/S。

paragraphs.en: Be sure to keep up with everything going on at IGN Live 2026 . You can check the full schedule to see what else is coming up across games, movies, TV, streaming, and more.
paragraphs.cn: 请务必关注IGN Live 2026的所有动态。你可以查看完整日程，了解游戏、电影、电视、流媒体等更多精彩内容。
